title: sarcocapnos crassifolia subsp. atlantis
intro: Sarcocapnos crassifolia subsp. atlantis, also known as the 'Atlantic Poppy', is a rare plant species belonging to the Papaveraceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to the presence of alkaloids and other compounds. The health benefits associated with Sarcocapnos crassifolia subsp. atlantis include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The plant can be prepared into various herbal products, such as infusions, decoctions, and ointments, to harness its medicinal properties for therapeutic purposes.
